appraisal_events.evidence: Il me fut présenté ... désirait être invité ... il prétendait ne pas être invité sans sa compagne ... j’avoue qu’il y a un degré d’ignominie ... Bref, j’éludai la réponse ... la princesse revint à la charge, mais sans plus de succès.
appraisal_events.explanation: Norpois describes having refused to invite Bergotte to the Embassy on the grounds of a moral judgment, excluding him from a prestigious social space while blaming him for hypocrisy and his private life.

status_effects.explanation: He is explicitly excluded from the Embassy's receptions by Norpois, a marked social sidelining.
